title: Display email as plain text instead of clickable link

requirements.text:
In the Contact component, replace the mailto anchor link for profxhandyman@gmail.com with a plain, non-clickable text element (e.g., a or

) that displays the email address as static text.

quotes: Can you make the email not clickable just add it as a text

acceptanceCriteria: The email address profxhandyman@gmail.com is visible in the Contact section.
Clicking or hovering over the email address does not navigate or open an email client.
No anchor tag or mailto: href is used for the email display.
The email text styling matches the surrounding contact info text.

nonGoals: Changing any other contact details (phone number, address, hours).
Modifying any other sections of the site.
